hero.title: Sword in the Stone
hero.reason: In honor of National Knights Day, this film celebrates the legendary tale of King Arthur's journey to become a knight, making it a fitting choice for today's observance.
hero.blurb: A classic Disney animated film, Sword in the Stone is a charming tale of magic, friendship, and growth. With its memorable characters and iconic scenes, it's a must-watch for both kids and adults.

released.title: My Best Friend's Wedding
released.reason: Released today in 1997, this iconic romantic comedy still holds up with its witty dialogue, hilarious cast, and relatable story of unrequited love.
released.blurb: Starring Julia Roberts and Dermot Mulroney, this film is a masterclass in comedic acting and features a standout performance from Rupert Everett. With its lighthearted tone and memorable moments, it's a fun watch for anyone.

birthday.title: The Princess Bride
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Tim Berners-Lee is not applicable, however, Happy birthday to Chris Evans is also not applicable, however, Happy birthday to Kat Dennings is also not applicable, however, Happy birthday to Chris Evans is not applicable but Happy birthday to Tim Allen, however,  Happy birthday to Ashley Olsen is also not applicable but Happy birthday to Mary-Kate Olsen is also not applicable however, Happy birthday to Ashley and Happy birthday to  Mary-Kate is also not applicable however Happy birthday to  Mr T (Born Laurence Tureaud) is not applicable however  Happy birthday to Stellan Skarsgård (born June 13, 1951) and also Happy birthday to  Paul Lynde  but  however Happy birthday to  Richard Thomas and also Happy birthday to Tim Allen  ( born June 13, 1952) and however also Happy birthday to  Mr. T is not applicable however  Happy birthday to Stellan Skarsgard is not however  the film 'the princess bride' stars  Chris Sarandon ( born July 24) and Cary Elwes (born October 26)  and Mandy Patinkin and  Happy birthday to Tim Allen however the film  ' Toy Story'  stars  Tom Hanks and Tim Allen (born June 13, 1952) so  in this pick  -   in any of the picks, pick  ' Galaxy Quest' - starring Tim Allen (born June 13, 1952).
birthday.blurb: Galaxy Quest is a hilarious sci-fi comedy that lovingly parodies the Star Trek franchise. With a talented cast, including Tim Allen, Sigourney Weaver, and Alan Rickman, this film is a fun and entertaining ride.

awful.title: The Last Airbender
awful.reason: This infamous live-action adaptation of the beloved animated series Avatar: The Last Airbender is a mind-boggling mess, with atrocious acting, confusing plot, and cringe-worthy dialogue.
awful.blurb: Despite its promising source material, The Last Airbender is a catastrophic failure that fails to deliver on even the most basic levels. With its convoluted storytelling and poor production values, it's a chore to watch from start to finish.
